description: Add group name s to the zones in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . This command may take the form zone group "slotname=groupname" — quotation marks required, — where slotname is the slot assignment and groupname is the group name.

6.0.description: Add group name s to the zones in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Group. This command may take the form zone group "slotname = groupname" — quotation marks required, spaces at equals sign ignored — where slotname is the slot assignment and groupname is the group name.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from the zones. If a slot is not specified, the group name is removed from all slots it is found in.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s. The default slot name is Default.

7.0.description: Add group name s to the zones in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups. This command may take the form zone group "slotname=groupname" — quotation marks required, — where slotname is the slot assignment and groupname is the group name.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from the zones. If a slot is not specified, the group name is removed from all slots it is found in.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s. The default slot name is Default.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from the zones. If a slot is not specified, the group name is removed from all slots where it is found.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s . If not supplied, a group name created by the command is assigned to the named Default .
